name: sentry-skills
description: Sentry-specific agent skills for code review, commits, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Sentry workflows for code review, commits, security review, and PRs.
interface.longDescription: Sentry-specific agent skills for engineering workflows including code review, commit discipline, PR writing, GitHub review handling, security review, and project documentation.
defaultPrompt: Review this branch using Sentry engineering practices.
Write a Sentry-style pull request description for this change.
Audit this repository for recommended Claude Code settings.
